name: Kindred Nursing Centers Limited Partnership v. Clark
question: Does the Federal Arbitration Act preempt Kentucky state-law precedent that requires a power of attorney agreement to expressly grant an attorney-in-fact the power to bind her principal to an arbitration agreement?
description: A case in which the Court held that the Federal Arbitration Act (FAA) preempts Kentucky state-law precedent that requires a clear statement in the power of attorney agreement in order to grant an attorney-in-fact the power to bind her principal to an arbitration agreement.
